message:
feat(runtime,harness): add effect system, baseline snapshot, and expand rollout scoring (+511 lines)

- effect_system.rs: extend effect execution pipeline
- tests/baseline.json: new performance baseline snapshot
- Expand seed RPC, benchmark gate, rollout scorecard, program lifecycle,
  and go_nogo_scorecard tests. Sync beads tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -321,9 +321,7 @@ impl std::fmt::Display for RolloutSummary {
         writeln!(
             f,
             "Shadow: {}/{} scenarios matched ({} required)",
-            self.shadow_matches,
-            self.shadow_scenarios,
-            self.min_shadow_scenarios_required,
+            self.shadow_matches, self.shadow_scenarios, self.min_shadow_scenarios_required,
         )?;
         writeln!(
             f,

@@ -122,5 +122,51 @@
     "p99_ns":    10,
     "p999_ns":   25,
     "threshold_pct": 10
+  },
+
+  "_runtime_section": "User-visible runtime benchmarks (bd-1vb19)",
+
+  "runtime_shutdown_latency": {
+    "description": "Time from quit signal to terminal cleanup complete",
+    "category": "user-visible",
+    "crate": "ftui-runtime",
+    "p50_ns":    500000,
+    "p95_ns":   2000000,
+    "p99_ns":   5000000,
+    "p999_ns": 10000000,
+    "threshold_pct": 15
+  },
+
+  "runtime_first_frame": {
+    "description": "Time from Program::run() to first frame rendered",
+    "category": "user-visible",
+    "crate": "ftui-runtime",
+    "p50_ns":   1000000,
+    "p95_ns":   5000000,
+    "p99_ns":  10000000,
+    "p999_ns": 20000000,
+    "threshold_pct": 15
+  },
+
+  "runtime_command_roundtrip": {
+    "description": "Time from Cmd::msg() dispatch to model update completion",
+    "category": "user-visible",
+    "crate": "ftui-runtime",
+    "p50_ns":    50000,
+    "p95_ns":   200000,
+    "p99_ns":   500000,
+    "p999_ns": 1000000,
+    "threshold_pct": 10
+  },
+
+  "runtime_effect_queue_drain": {
+    "description": "Time to drain effect queue after shutdown signal",
+    "category": "user-visible",
+    "crate": "ftui-runtime",
+    "p50_ns":   100000,
+    "p95_ns":   500000,
+    "p99_ns":  2000000,
+    "p999_ns": 5000000,
+    "threshold_pct": 15
   }
